name: Do I qualify if my site is small, not like New York Times?

mainEntity.name: Do I qualify if my site is small, not like New York Times?

acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, copyright protects all original works; small sites sue AI firms successfully if copying proven.[2][3] Tribune/Dow Jones scale irrelevant to infringement.[5][6] Key factors: Originality, fixation, copying. No minimum size. Register for leverage. Nationwide claims viable. Start evidence collection.
